Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface IPlayerTradeData

  • public interface IPlayerTradeData
    Interface for player trade data (currency and auction claims). Note: If Vault integration is enabled in config, currency operations will use the Vault economy instead of CNPC+ built-in currency.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean canAfford​(long amount)
      Check if player can afford an amount
      boolean deposit​(long amount)
      Add currency to balance (deposit)
      String formatBalance()
      Format the balance for display
      long getBalance()
      Get the current balance
      IAuctionClaim getClaim​(String claimId)
      Get a specific claim by ID.
      int getClaimCount()
      Get the number of pending auction claims
      IAuctionClaim[] getClaims()
      Get all pending auction claims for this player.
      long getLifetimeEarned()
      Get lifetime earned currency
      long getLifetimeSpent()
      Get lifetime spent currency
      boolean hasClaims()
      Check if player has any pending auction claims
      boolean isUsingVault()
      Check if Vault is being used for currency operations
      void setBalance​(long balance)
      Set the balance directly
      boolean withdraw​(long amount)
      Remove currency from balance (withdraw)

    • Method Detail

      • getBalance

        long getBalance()
        Get the current balance
        Returns:
        the player's current currency balance

      • setBalance

        void setBalance​(long balance)
        Set the balance directly
        Parameters:
        balance - The new balance

      • deposit

        boolean deposit​(long amount)
        Add currency to balance (deposit)
        Parameters:
        amount - Amount to add
        Returns:
        true if successful, false if would exceed max balance

      • withdraw

        boolean withdraw​(long amount)
        Remove currency from balance (withdraw)
        Parameters:
        amount - Amount to remove
        Returns:
        true if successful, false if insufficient funds

      • canAfford

        boolean canAfford​(long amount)
        Check if player can afford an amount
        Parameters:
        amount - Amount to check
        Returns:
        true if player has enough balance

      • getLifetimeEarned

        long getLifetimeEarned()
        Get lifetime earned currency
        Returns:
        the total currency earned over the player's lifetime

      • getLifetimeSpent

        long getLifetimeSpent()
        Get lifetime spent currency
        Returns:
        the total currency spent over the player's lifetime

      • formatBalance

        String formatBalance()
        Format the balance for display
        Returns:
        the balance formatted as a human-readable string

      • isUsingVault

        boolean isUsingVault()
        Check if Vault is being used for currency operations
        Returns:
        true if Vault is handling currency, false if using CNPC+ built-in

      • getClaimCount

        int getClaimCount()
        Get the number of pending auction claims
        Returns:
        the number of pending auction claims

      • hasClaims

        boolean hasClaims()
        Check if player has any pending auction claims
        Returns:
        true if the player has pending auction claims

      • getClaims

        IAuctionClaim[] getClaims()
        Get all pending auction claims for this player.
        Returns:
        array of the player's pending auction claims

      • getClaim

        IAuctionClaim getClaim​(String claimId)
        Get a specific claim by ID.
        Parameters:
        claimId - The claim ID
        Returns:
        The claim, or null if not found
